- [My Notifications - EventHost](/notifications): View all your event notifications and updates.
- [My Profile - Manage Your Account](/profile): View and edit your profile details, payment information, and account settings.
- [Organizer Dashboard - EventHost](/organizerdashboard): Manage your events, view analytics, and more.

- [Payment Successful! - EventHost](/paymentsuccess): Your ticket purchase was successful.
- [Speaker Dashboard - EventHost](/speakerdashboard): View your upcoming speaking engagements and manage your profile.
